testcase.system-out:
@Booking @CreateBooking Scenario Outline: Successfully create booking # src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:26 Given I load default booking request # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.loadDefaultBookingRequest() And I update firstname as "David" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.updateFirstName(java.lang.String) And I update lastname as "Kumar" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.updateLastName(java.lang.String) And I update totalprice as "700" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.updateTotalPrice(java.lang.String) When I send a POST request to endpoint "booker.booking" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.sendPostRequest(java.lang.String) Then the response status code should be 200 # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateStatusCode(java.lang.Integer) When I send a POST request to endpoint "booker.booking" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.sendPostRequest(java.lang.String) Then the response status code should be 200 # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateStatusCode(java.lang.Integer) And the response should contain field "bookingid" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateField(java.lang.String) And the response should match "booking/ExpectedBooking.json" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateResponse(java.lang.String) java.lang.AssertionError: Value mismatch expected [Navya] but found [John] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:85) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compareFields(ReflectionComparator.java:170) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:104) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compareFields(ReflectionComparator.java:170) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:104) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:53) at validators.ResponseValidator.validatePojo(ResponseValidator.java:106) at core.ApiExecutor.validatePojo(ApiExecutor.java:354) at stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateResponse(BookingSteps.java:69) at âœ½.the response should match "booking/ExpectedBooking.json"(file:///C:/Users/mohan/eclipse-workspace/RestAssured_APIAutomation_Framework/src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:21)
And the response should contain field "bookingid" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateField(java.lang.String) And the response should match "booking/ExpectedBooking.json" # stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateResponse(java.lang.String) java.lang.AssertionError: Value mismatch expected [Navya] but found [David] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:85) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compareFields(ReflectionComparator.java:170) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:104) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compareFields(ReflectionComparator.java:170) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:104) at validators.ReflectionComparator.compare(ReflectionComparator.java:53) at validators.ResponseValidator.validatePojo(ResponseValidator.java:106) at core.ApiExecutor.validatePojo(ApiExecutor.java:354) at stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.validateResponse(BookingSteps.java:69) at âœ½.the response should match "booking/ExpectedBooking.json"(file:///C:/Users/mohan/eclipse-workspace/RestAssured_APIAutomation_Framework/src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:21)
